label: TikTok — Vertical Video Feed Browser
description: Extracted from: ScrapeClaw tiktok-scraper, drawrowfly/tiktok-scraper, scrapfly.io TikTok guides, generic infinite-scroll scrapers. Verified 2026-07-16: /explore loads (1516px, 127 child elements) via JS/WebComponents — body.innerText is empty. Content rendered in shadow DOM. Requires auth for personalized feed.
source_patterns: Vertical swipe navigation: 500-700px scroll per video (matches viewport height)
Watch time per video: 8-30s (real). For automation: 3-8s pause (content load + interaction)
Like: tap right side (x: 80% width, y: 50% height) — not centre
Comment: tap comment icon → 2s load → type → 3-5s → post
Profile grid: horizontal scroll of video thumbnails; click → vertical swipe mode

active_hours.description: Late afternoon to late night — peak youth hours

scroll.description: Video-by-video vertical swipe. Each swipe = one video. Pause between = 'watching'

mouse.description: Moderate — tap targets are large, precise clicks not needed

like_zone.description: TikTok like button is bottom-right. Double-tap on video also works.

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate FYP → scroll (swipe 1 video = 700px, pause 3-8s) → like on interesting → scroll next → repeat 5-8 times → click profile → scroll grid → click video → repeat
